data.name: Furry Christmas Temptation – Naughty Jigsaw
data.detailed_description:
When Christmas meets temptation, the result is… irresistible.
In Furry Christmas Temptation – Naughty Jigsaw, the holiday spirit grows ears, tails, and a lot of charm. Piece together gorgeous (and delicious) puzzles featuring 30 exclusive artworks, bursting with color, sensuality, and that playful furry magic you can’t resist.

Every image is a festive temptation — warm, vibrant, and just naughty enough to melt even the coldest snowman. 😈

🎅 Game Highlights:
🧩 Three difficulty levels — choose between 81, 196, or 361 pieces, and play at your own pace.
🎨 30 exclusive illustrations filled with sensuality, fluff, and holiday energy.
💋 A variety of furry characters — wolves, foxes, cats, bunnies, and more, each with their own unique charm and attitude.
🎁 Unlock and download your favorite images to build your personal gallery of festive temptations.
🏆 Plenty of achievements to earn, because pleasure is also about progress.
🎶 Smooth, cozy Christmas soundtrack that blends warmth, playfulness, and desire.
🌟 Elegant and intuitive interface, perfect for relaxing and letting yourself be carried away.

Get into the spirit of a different kind of Christmas, where the heat doesn’t come from the fireplace… but from what you’re putting together piece by piece.
Furry Christmas Temptation – Naughty Jigsaw: the hottest holiday of the year starts right here. 🎁💋

data.short_description: 🎄 The holidays just got wild — and a little too hot for snow! 🔥💋 Furry Christmas Temptation – Naughty Jigsaw brings festive charm and seductive furry characters together in 30 spicy puzzles with 3 difficulty levels for a cozy and naughty holiday escape.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 德文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 丹麥文*, 芬蘭文*, 荷蘭文*, 挪威文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 羅馬尼亞文*, 瑞典文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP/Vista/7/8/10
  • 處理器: 2 Ghz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 500 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
